rationale: No opinion piece was written. The response consists entirely of an internal thinking process, brainstorming notes, and an incomplete outline. The actual deliverable—a persuasive op-ed arguing for extended library hours—is entirely absent. There is nothing to evaluate as finished nonfiction writing.
